title: Total supplement income or loss 2024
description: Complete the total supplement income or loss section in your supplementary tax return.
keywords: Individual tax return instructions, tax return,2024, supplementary income, supplement, supplement income, supplement loss, supplement return, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

content_blocks.text: To complete this question, follow the steps below.
Add up all the income amounts in the right-hand column of questions 13 , 17 , 18 , 19 , 20 , 21 , 22 , 23 and 24 in your supplementary tax return.
Add up all the loss amounts, if any, in the right-hand column of questions 13 , 17 , 20 and 21 .
Subtract the amount you worked out at Step 2 from the total income amount you worked out at step 1. Your answer is your total supplement income or loss.

Write your answer from Step 3 at Total supplement income or loss in your supplementary tax return. Don't show cents. If you made an overall loss, print L in the Loss box at Total supplement income or loss .
Transfer this amount you wrote at Total supplement income or loss to label I on page 3 in your tax return. If the amount was a loss, print L in the Loss box at the right of the amount.
Go to Total income or loss 2024 then work through the Deductions section, starting at Claiming deductions 2024 .

items: Go to question D11 Deductible amount of UPP of a foreign pension or annuity 2024 .
Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2024 .
Go back to question 24 Other income 2024 .

content_text:
## Completing your supplementary tax return
To complete this question, follow the steps below.
### Step 1
Add up all the income amounts in the right-hand column of questions 13 , 17 , 18 , 19 , 20 , 21 , 22 , 23 and 24 in your supplementary tax return.
### Step 2
Add up all the loss amounts, if any, in the right-hand column of questions 13 , 17 , 20 and 21 .
### Step 3
Subtract the amount you worked out at Step 2 from the total income amount you worked out at step 1. Your answer is your total supplement income or loss.
### Step 4
Write your answer from Step 3 at Total supplement income or loss in your supplementary tax return. Don't show cents. If you made an overall loss, print L in the Loss box at Total supplement income or loss .
### Step 5
Transfer this amount you wrote at Total supplement income or loss to label I on page 3 in your tax return. If the amount was a loss, print L in the Loss box at the right of the amount.
### Step 6
Go to Total income or loss 2024 then work through the Deductions section, starting at Claiming deductions 2024 .
## Where to go next
- Go to question D11 Deductible amount of UPP of a foreign pension or annuity 2024 .
- Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2024 .
- Go back to question 24 Other income 2024 .
